rationale.R1.7: Delegation is an explicit, unambiguous citation-checking request. The artifact contains six in-text citations whose author names, years, attributed claims, and completeness of coverage must all be verified. This is the sole load-bearing task. One immediate flag: the artifact attributes the 'original COMET formulation' to 'Kowalski et al. (2019)', yet the artifact itself also cites 'Rei et al. (2020)' for COMET — the Rei et al. 2020 WMT paper is the canonical COMET introduction; 'Kowalski et al. 2019' does not correspond to any known COMET publication and is likely a hallucinated or misattributed reference requiring correction.
